s_ni_1.text_en: I have never seen such a beautiful sunset before.

s_natierlech_1.text_en: It is natural to feel nervous before an important exam.
s_natierlech_1.text_lu: Et ass ganz normal, nervös ze sinn virun engem wichtegen Examen.

s_natierlech_1.text_lu: Hie war natierlech begabt am Spillen vu ville Instrumenter.

s_sécher_1.text_lu: Mir sinn séchert an intakt bei eisem Zil ukomm no der Rees.

s_wahrscheinlech_1.text_en: It is very likely that the train will arrive on time.
s_wahrscheinlech_1.text_lu: Et ass ganz wahrscheinlech, dass de Zong op Zäit ukomm wäert.

s_wahrscheinlech_1.text_en: I will probably finish my project by the end of week.

s_einfach_1.text_lu: Hie gouf déi komplex Theorie op eng ganz einfach Manéier erkläert.

s_schwéier_1.text_en: This task is much harder than I initially thought it would be.
s_schwéier_1.text_lu: Dës Aarbecht ass vill méi schwéier wéi ech éichtens geduecht hunn.

s_schwéier_1.text_en: It was a very difficult decision to make under these circumstances.
s_schwéier_1.text_lu: Et war eng ganz schwéier Entscheedung, déi ënner dëse Ëmstänn ze treffen.

s_méiglech_1.text_lu: Et ass méiglech, an enger Stonn vun Lëtzebuerg op London ze fliegen.

s_méiglech_1.text_en: We must consider all the potential solutions as soon as possible.
s_méiglech_1.text_lu: Mir mussen all méiglech Léisungen sou schnell wéi méiglech an Erwägung kréien.

s_onméiglech_1.text_en: It is impossible to finish all this work in just one day.

s_moies_1.text_en: I always drink a cup of coffee every morning at seven.

s_moies_1.text_en: The birds begin to sing very early in the morning.

s_mëttes_1.text_en: We usually eat our lunch together at exactly twelve o'clock.

s_owes_1.text_en: I like to relax and watch a movie in the evening.

s_nuets_1.text_en: The stars shine very brightly in the sky during the night.

s_fréier_1.text_en: The weather was much warmer in this region in the past.

s_spéider_1.text_en: I will call you back later this evening to discuss plans.

s_spéider_1.text_en: We will see the results of our hard work in the near future.

s_gläich_1.text_en: We are all treated as equals under the current law.
s_gläich_1.text_lu: Mir ginn all als Gläich behandelt ënner dem aktuellen Gesetz.

s_gläich_1.text_en: The two brothers look almost exactly the same to me.

s_nach_1.text_en: Are you still living in the same house in the city?

s_nach_1.text_en: I have another important question that I would like to ask.
s_nach_1.text_lu: Ech hunn eng aner wichteg Fro, déi ech gär stelle wéilt.

s_schon_1.text_en: I have already finished all of my work for today.
s_schon_1.text_lu: Ech hunn all meng Aarbecht fir haut scho fäerdeg gemaach.

s_schon_1.text_en: The train has already left the station for the destination.
s_schon_1.text_lu: De Zong huet schonn d'Gare fir d'Destinatioun verlooss.

s_nach net_1.text_lu: Ech hunn nach net décidéiert, wou ech fir mäi Vakanz wäert goen.

s_nach net_1.text_en: The results of the exam have not been published yet.

s_erëm_1.text_en: I am very glad to see you again after such a long time.

s_erëm_1.text_en: Please don't make the same mistake again in the future.

s_bal_1.text_en: The movie is almost finished, it only has ten minutes left.
s_bal_1.text_lu: De Film ass quasi fäerdeg, et sinn nach just zéng Minutten ze goen.

s_bal_1.text_en: I was almost late for my appointment due to the traffic.
s_bal_1.text_lu: Ech war beinahe ze spéit zu mäi Rendez-vous wéinst dem Verkéier.

s_derbäi_1.text_en: He was present during the meeting and heard everything.

s_derbäi_1.text_en: There is also a map included in the back of the guidebook.
s_derbäi_1.text_lu: Et ass och eng Kaart am Réckdeel vum Reisesguide abegraff.

s_do_1.text_en: I left my keys over there on the kitchen table.
s_do_1.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Schlësselen do op der Kichen-Tisch gelooss.

s_do_1.text_en: If you look over there, you can see the castle on the hill.
s_do_1.text_lu: Wann Dir do kuckt, kënnt Dir de Schlass op der Kopp gesinn.

s_hei_1.text_en: I have been living here in this city for over ten years.
s_hei_1.text_lu: Ech wunnen an dëser Stad schonn iwwer zéng Joer.

s_hei_1.text_en: Please put all of your bags here in the corner of the room.
s_hei_1.text_lu: Bitte stellt all Är Säcken hei an der Eck vum Raum.

s_ewech_1.text_en: He moved away to another country several years ago.
s_ewech_1.text_lu: Hie war vir e puer Joren an e méi anert Land geplënnert.

s_ewech_1.text_en: Please take these old boxes away from the living room.
s_ewech_1.text_lu: Ech wënsch, dass Dir déi al Këschten aus dem Wunnzimmer wechhuelen.

s_iwwerall_1.text_en: I have been looking for my phone everywhere in the whole house.
s_iwwerall_1.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Telefon iwwerall am ganze Haus gesicht.

s_iwwerall_1.text_en: There were beautiful flowers blooming everywhere in the park.
s_iwwerall_1.text_lu: Et waren schéin Blummen, déi iwwerall am Park bléien.

s_néierens_1.text_en: I am sorry, but there is nowhere else for us to stay tonight.
s_néierens_1.text_lu: Et deet mir leed, mee et gëtt näischt anescht wou mir haut Nuecht bleiwen.

s_néierens_1.text_en: The keys were nowhere to be found, despite our long search.
s_néierens_1.text_lu: D'Schlësselen waren nierends ze fanen, trotz eissem laange Sich.

s_eppes_1.text_en: I would like to eat something sweet after my dinner.
s_eppes_1.text_lu: Ech wëll gär eppes Séisses no mengem Dinner iessen.

s_eppes_1.text_en: Did you hear something moving in the bushes over there?
s_eppes_1.text_lu: Huet dir eppes an de Bëscher do dräi beweegen?

s_näischt_1.text_en: I have nothing left to say about the current situation.
s_näischt_1.text_lu: Ech hunn näischt méi ze soen iwwer déi aktuell Situatioun.

s_näischt_1.text_en: He sat there for an hour and said absolutely nothing.
s_näischt_1.text_lu: Hie sat do fir eng Stonn a sot absolut näischt.

s_jiddereen_1.text_en: Everyone is invited to join the party at my house tonight.
s_jiddereen_1.text_lu: Jiddereen ass invitéiert, bei mir doheem haut Awend bei der Party ze feieren.

s_jiddereen_1.text_en: Every person has their own opinion on this complex matter.
s_jiddereen_1.text_lu: Jiddereen huet seng eegen Meenung zu dëser komplexer Fro.

s_alles_1.text_en: Everything will be alright in the end, don't worry.
s_alles_1.text_lu: Alles wäert am Enn gutt goen, net roueg.

s_alles_1.text_en: I have already prepared everything for our trip now.
s_alles_1.text_lu: Ech hunn alles fir eis Rees elo schonn virbereet.

s_selwer_1.text_en: He did all the hard work by himself without any help.
s_selwer_1.text_lu: Hien huet all déi schwéier Aarbecht ganz alleng ouni all Hëllef gemaach.

s_selwer_1.text_en: You should try to solve the problem yourself first.
s_selwer_1.text_lu: Dir sollt d'Problem fir d'éischt selwer probéieren ze léisen.

s_zesummen_1.text_en: We should all work together to achieve our goals.
s_zesummen_1.text_lu: Mir sollten all zesummen schaffen fir eis Ziler ze erreechen.

s_zesummen_1.text_en: They have been living together in the city for years.
s_zesummen_1.text_lu: Si liewen zanter Joeren zesummen an der Stad.

s_eleng_1.text_en: I don't like to be alone in the house during night.
s_eleng_1.text_lu: Ech gär net eleng am Haus während der Nuecht sinn.

s_eleng_1.text_en: He traveled all around the world alone and met people.
s_eleng_1.text_lu: Hie reest eleng ronderëm d'Welt a gouf mat Leit bekannt.

s_e bëssen_1.text_en: I speak a little bit of Luxembourgish, I am learning.
s_e bëssen_1.text_lu: Ech schwätze e bësschen Lëtzebuergesch, ech léieren.

s_e bëssen_1.text_en: Could you please turn the music down just a little?
s_e bëssen_1.text_lu: Kënnt Dir wgl. d'Musek e bëssen ofdréien?

s_genuch_1.text_en: Do you have enough money to buy that expensive new car?
s_genuch_1.text_lu: Hutt Dir genuch Geld, fir dat déiert Neit Auto ze kafen?

s_genuch_1.text_en: I have had enough to eat, thank you for the delicious meal.
s_genuch_1.text_lu: Ech hunn genuch ze iessen, merci fir de leckere Mëttegessen.

s_ze vill_1.text_en: There are too many people in this small room today.
s_ze vill_1.text_lu: Et sinn ze vill Leit an dësem klengen Raum haut.

s_ze vill_1.text_en: I have too much work to do before the weekend begins.
s_ze vill_1.text_lu: Ech hunn ze vill Aarbecht ze maachen ier d'Wochenend fänkt.

s_souguer_1.text_en: He was even more successful than his older brother.
s_souguer_1.text_lu: Hie war nach méi erfolgréich wéi säi grousse Brudder.

s_souguer_1.text_en: It was so cold that even the river began to freeze.
s_souguer_1.text_lu: Et war sou kale wéi souguer de Floss ugefaangen ass ze gefrieren.

s_besonnesch_1.text_en: I really like this book, especially the final chapter.
s_besonnesch_1.text_lu: Ech mooss dëst Buch wierklech gär, besonnesch de leschten Kapitel.

s_besonnesch_1.text_en: This is a very special day that we should celebrate.
s_besonnesch_1.text_lu: Dëst ass e ganz speziellen Dag deen mir solle feieren.

s_grad_1.text_en: I am just about to finish my dinner, give me a moment.
s_grad_1.text_lu: Ech si just am Ofschloss vu mengem Dinner, gitt mir e Moment.

s_grad_1.text_en: Exactly what do you mean by that strange comment?
s_grad_1.text_lu: Wat genau meeschtes du mat deem seltsamen Kommentar?

s_just_1.text_en: I am just a student learning how to speak a language.
s_just_1.text_lu: Ech sinn just e Student deen léiert wéi een eng Sprooch schwätzt.

s_just_1.text_en: It was just a small mistake, don't worry about it.
s_just_1.text_lu: Et war just e klengen Feeler, maach dir keng Sorgen.

s_un_1.text_en: I have a lot of work to do on my new project today.
s_un_1.text_lu: Ech hunn haut vill Aarbecht op mengem neien Projet.

s_un_1.text_en: The light is turned on in the room, so someone must be there.
s_un_1.text_lu: D'Liicht ass am Raum ugeschalt, also mussen ech do sinn.

s_aus_1.text_en: I am from a small village in the north of the country.
s_aus_1.text_lu: Ech sinn aus engem klengen Duerf am Norden vum Land.

s_aus_1.text_en: Please turn the light off before you leave the room.
s_aus_1.text_lu: Bitte schalt d'Liicht aus, ier Dir de Raum verlasst.

s_bei_1.text_en: I am currently at my office working on the report.
s_bei_1.text_lu: Ech sinn momentan an mengem Büro an ech schaffen un dem Rapport.

s_bei_1.text_en: He lives near the park in the center of the city.
s_bei_1.text_lu: Hien wunnt bei de Park am Zentrum vun der Stad.

s_zënter_1.text_en: I have been living here since I was a small child.
s_zënter_1.text_lu: Ech wunnen hei zanter ech e klengt Kand war.

s_zënter_1.text_en: It has been raining continuously since early morning.
s_zënter_1.text_lu: Et reent kontinuéierlech zanter fréi moien.

s_bis_1.text_en: I will wait for you at the station until five o'clock.
s_bis_1.text_lu: Ech waarden op dech um Gare bis fënnef Auer.

s_bis_1.text_en: The price is between ten and twenty euros for the item.
s_bis_1.text_lu: De Präis läit tëscht zéng an zwanzeg Euro fir de Produit.

s_direkt_1.text_en: Please go directly to the manager's office after lunch.
s_direkt_1.text_lu: Gitt w.e.g. direkt an de Büro vum Manager no Mëttegessen.

s_direkt_1.text_en: It is a direct flight from Luxembourg to Berlin.
s_direkt_1.text_lu: Et ass e Direkfluch vu Lëtzebuerg op Berlin.

s_endlech_1.text_en: I have finally finished my project after weeks of work.
s_endlech_1.text_lu: No Wochen uechter Aarbecht hunn ech endlech mäi Projet fäerdeg bruecht.

s_endlech_1.text_en: Finally, the sun began to shine through the heavy clouds.
s_endlech_1.text_lu: Endlech huet d'Sonn duerch déi schwéier Wolken ugefaangen ze scheinen.

s_bestëmmt_1.text_en: I am certain that he will arrive on time for the meeting.
s_bestëmmt_1.text_lu: Ech sinn sécher datt hien am Zäit fir d'Reunioun ukommen.

s_bestëmmt_1.text_en: We reached a definitive agreement after a long discussion.
s_bestëmmt_1.text_lu: Mir sinn no laanger Diskussioun zu engem definitive Accord komm.

s_souwisou_1.text_en: I was going to the store anyway, so I can buy some milk.
s_souwisou_1.text_lu: Ech war sowieso op der Strooss, also kann ech e bëssen Mëllech kafen.

s_souwisou_1.text_en: It doesn't matter now, I would have found out anyway.
s_souwisou_1.text_lu: Et mécht elo egal, ech wär et trotzdem erausfënnt.

s_iergendwéi_1.text_en: I will find a way to solve this problem somehow, I promise.
s_iergendwéi_1.text_lu: Ech wäert e Manéier fannen, dës Problem op e Manéier ze léisen, ech verspriechen et.

s_iergendwéi_1.text_en: It felt strange somehow, but she couldn't explain why.
s_iergendwéi_1.text_lu: Et huet e bëssen eesch gefillt, mee si konnt net erklären firwat.

s_iergendwann_1.text_en: We should meet for coffee sometime during the next week.
s_iergendwann_1.text_lu: Mir sollten eis nächste Woch op e Kaffi treffen.

s_iergendwann_1.text_en: I hope to travel around the whole world at some point.
s_iergendwann_1.text_lu: Ech hoffen, eemol ronderëm d'Welt ze reesen.

s_iergendwou_1.text_en: I must have left my keys somewhere in the living room.
s_iergendwou_1.text_lu: Ech muss meng Schlëssel eppes an der Wunnzëmmer gelooss hunn.

s_iergendwou_1.text_en: I want to move somewhere quiet where I can relax more.
s_iergendwou_1.text_lu: Ech wëll an e rouegen Ecken, wou ech méi entspanne kann.

s_iergendee_1.text_en: Did anyone see where my blue bag went after the party?
s_iergendee_1.text_lu: Huet eemech gesinn, wou mäi bloe Sak no der Party gelant ass?

s_iergendee_1.text_en: Someone is knocking at the door, but I don't know who.
s_iergendee_1.text_lu: Ech héieren, wéi et klopft, mee ech weess net, wien et ass.

s_zëmmer_1.text_en: My bedroom is the smallest room in our house.
s_zëmmer_1.text_lu: Meng Schlofkummer ass de klengsten Raum an eisem Haus.

s_zëmmer_1.text_en: Please make sure that the meeting room is ready by ten.
s_zëmmer_1.text_lu: Gitt w.e.g. sécher, datt de Meetingraum bis zanter 10:00 fäerdig ass.

s_kichen_1.text_en: The delicious smell of baking bread was coming from the kitchen.
s_kichen_1.text_lu: De leckere Geruch vu gebakkenem Brout koum aus der Kichen.

s_kichen_1.text_en: I need to clean the kitchen after I finish cooking tonight.
s_kichen_1.text_lu: Ech muss d'Kichen nofërmëschen, wann ech haut den Owend mam Kachen fäertig sinn.

s_bad_1.text_en: I enjoy taking a long, warm bath after a hard day of work.
s_bad_1.text_lu: Ech genéissen e laang, waarm Bad no engem haarden Dag an der Aarbecht.

s_bad_1.text_en: The bathroom is located at the end of the long hallway.
s_bad_1.text_lu: D'Bad ass um Enn vum laange Gang.

s_bett_1.text_en: I was so tired that I went straight to bed after dinner.
s_bett_1.text_lu: Ech war sou midd, dass ech direkt nom Iessen an d'Bett gaangen sinn.

s_bett_1.text_en: The guest bed is very comfortable and has soft pillows.
s_bett_1.text_lu: De Gästebett ass ganz bequem a huet weiche Kissen.

s_stull_1.text_en: Please take a seat on the chair near the open window.
s_stull_1.text_lu: Prenez place sur la chaise près de la fenêtre ouverte.

s_stull_1.text_en: The office chair is ergonomically designed for comfort.
s_stull_1.text_lu: De Bürostuhl ass ergonomesch fir Komfort entworf.

s_fenster_1.text_en: Please close the window because it is getting a bit cold.
s_fenster_1.text_lu: Maach wgl. d'Fënster zou, well et gëtt e bëssen kal.

s_fenster_1.text_en: I stood by the window and watched the birds flying by.
s_fenster_1.text_lu: Ech stoung beim Fënster a kucke wéi d'Vullen eran fléien.

s_dier_1.text_en: Please lock the front door when you leave the house tonight.
s_dier_1.text_lu: Sperrt wgl. d'Haaptport beim Verlassen vum Haus haut Awend.

s_dier_1.text_en: Someone is knocking at the door, can you see who it is?
s_dier_1.text_lu: Jemeng klappt un der Dier, kanns du kucken, wien et ass?

s_schlëssel_1.text_en: I have lost my car keys and I can't find them anywhere.
s_schlëssel_1.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Autoschlüssel verluer an ech kann se nierends fannen.

s_schlëssel_1.text_en: Please leave the keys on the kitchen table before you go.
s_schlëssel_1.text_lu: Loosst wgl. d'Schlësselen op der Kichen-Tësch, ier Dir fortgeet.

s_auto_1.text_en: I am planning to buy a new electric car next year.
s_auto_1.text_lu: Ech plangen nächst Joer e neien elektresche Auto ze kafen.

s_auto_1.text_en: His car is parked in front of the large office building.
s_auto_1.text_lu: Seng Auto ass virun dem groussen Bürogebai geparkt.

s_bus_1.text_en: The bus arrives at the station every fifteen minutes.
s_bus_1.text_lu: De Bus kënnt all fënnefzéng Minutten am Gare un.

s_bus_1.text_en: I usually take the bus to work because it is more convenient.
s_bus_1.text_lu: Ech fuere normalerweis mam Bus op d'Aarbecht, well et méi praktesch ass.

s_zuch_1.text_en: The train to Berlin leaves from platform six in ten minutes.
s_zuch_1.text_lu: De Zong fir Berlin fuer vum Gleis 6 an 10 Minutten.

s_zuch_1.text_en: Traveling by train is one of my favorite ways to see the country.
s_zuch_1.text_lu: Reesen mam Zuch ass ee vu mäi Liiblingsmanéieren, fir dat Land ze gesinn.

s_vëlo_1.text_en: I enjoy riding my bike through the park on Sunday mornings.
s_vëlo_1.text_lu: Ech genéisst et, sonntagsmorgens mam Velo duerch de Park ze fueren.

s_vëlo_1.text_en: He bought a very expensive racing bike for the competition.
s_vëlo_1.text_lu: Hie kaaft e ganz deier Coursevelo fir de Concours.

s_strooss_1.text_en: Please be careful when you cross the main street during rush hour.
s_strooss_1.text_lu: Bitte passt op wann Dir während der Stoßzeit déi Haaptstrooss queret.

s_strooss_1.text_en: There are many small shops and cafes along this narrow street.
s_strooss_1.text_lu: Et gëtt vill kleng Geschäfter a Cafés laang dës schmuel Strooss.

s_plaz_1.text_en: The town square is the central meeting place for the local people.
s_plaz_1.text_lu: De Stadsplaz ass de zentrale Treffpunkt fir d'lokal Bevölkerung.

s_plaz_1.text_en: I am looking for a quiet place where I can read my book in peace.
s_plaz_1.text_lu: Ech sichen e rouegen Plaz wou ech mäi Buch a Rou kënnen liesen.

s_duerf_1.text_en: I grew up in a very small village located in the north.
s_duerf_1.text_lu: Ech sinn an engem ganz klengen Duerf am Norden opgewuess.

s_duerf_1.text_en: Life in the village is much slower than life in the big city.
s_duerf_1.text_lu: D'Liewen am Duerf ass vill méi lues wéi d'Liewen an der grousser Stad.

s_bierg_1.text_en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely breath-taking.
s_bierg_1.text_lu: D'Vue vum Buedem vum Bierg war absolut atemberaubend.

s_bierg_1.text_en: We went hiking in the mountains during our summer holiday.
s_bierg_1.text_lu: Mir sinn während eiser Summerferien an den Bergen gewandert.

s_bësch_1.text_en: I like to go for a long walk in the forest to relax.
s_bësch_1.text_lu: Ech ge gär an der Wald fir laang Spazéieren ze goen, fir ze relaxen.

s_bësch_1.text_en: There are many different types of trees in this ancient forest.
s_bësch_1.text_lu: Et gëtt vill verschidde Aarte vu Bëmer an dësem ale Bësch.

s_waasser_1.text_en: Please make sure to drink enough water when it is hot.
s_waasser_1.text_lu: Drénkt genuch Waasser wann et waarm ass.

s_waasser_1.text_en: The water in the river is very clear and refreshingly cold.
s_waasser_1.text_lu: D'Waasser am Floss ass ganz klor a erfrëschend kal.

s_mier_1.text_en: I love to spend my summer holidays by the Mediterranean Sea.
s_mier_1.text_lu: Ech gär meng Summerspiller am Mëttelmier verbréngen.

s_mier_1.text_en: The sound of the sea waves is very calming to listen to.
s_mier_1.text_lu: De Kläng vun de Mierwellen sinn ganz berouegend ze lauschteren.

s_floss_1.text_en: The Moselle river is very important for the local wine industry.
s_floss_1.text_lu: D'Musel ass ganz wichteg fir d'lokal Wäiindustrie.

s_floss_1.text_en: We went for a boat trip along the river yesterday afternoon.
s_floss_1.text_lu: Mir hunn e Samsdegnoen eng Bootstour op der Musel gemaach.

s_loft_1.text_en: I need some fresh air after spending all day in the office.
s_loft_1.text_lu: Ech brauch e bëssen frësch Loft nodeem ech de ganzen Dag am Büro war.

s_loft_1.text_en: The air in the mountains is much cleaner than in the city.
s_loft_1.text_lu: D'Loft an den Bierger ass vill méi propper wéi an der Stad.

s_sonn_1.text_en: The sun rises in the east and sets in the west every day.
s_sonn_1.text_lu: D'Sonn geet all Dag am Osten op an am Westen ënner.

s_sonn_1.text_en: I enjoy sitting in the sun and reading a good book.
s_sonn_1.text_lu: Ech genéisst et, an der Sonn ze sëtzen an e gudde Buch ze liesen.

s_mound_1.text_en: The moon was shining brightly in the dark sky last night.
s_mound_1.text_lu: De Mound huet gëschter an der donkeler Nuecht hell geschéngt.

s_mound_1.text_en: The first man landed on the moon over fifty years ago.
s_mound_1.text_lu: Deen éischte Mënsch ass vir iwwer fofzeg Joer op de Mound gelant.

s_stären_1.text_en: You can see millions of stars in the sky on a clear night.
s_stären_1.text_lu: Dir kënnt Millioune Stäre am Himmel gesinn, bei klorem Himmel.

s_stären_1.text_en: The stars were twinkling like tiny diamonds in the dark sky.
s_stären_1.text_lu: D'Stäre blénken wéi kleng Diamanten am donkelen Himmel.

s_wieder_1.text_en: What is the weather forecast for the upcoming weekend?
s_wieder_1.text_lu: Wat ass de Wiederbericht fir de kommenden Weekend?

s_wieder_1.text_en: The weather was so bad that we decided to stay at home.
s_wieder_1.text_lu: Et war esou schlechtes Wieder, dass mir beschloust hunn, doheem ze bleiwen.

s_reen_1.text_en: The plants in the garden need some rain after the long heat.
s_reen_1.text_lu: D'Planz am Gaart brauchen e bëssen Reen no der laanger Hëtzt.

s_reen_1.text_en: I forgot my umbrella and got soaked in the heavy rain.
s_reen_1.text_lu: Ech hunn mäi Schirm vergéisst a gouf am schwéieren Reen ganz naass.

s_wand_1.text_en: The wind was blowing very hard during the storm last night.
s_wand_1.text_lu: De Wand blous séier schwéier wärend dem Stuerm gëschter.

s_wand_1.text_en: There is a cold wind coming from the north this morning.
s_wand_1.text_lu: Et ass e kalen Nordwind, deen haut Moien weht.

s_famill_1.text_en: I am planning to spend the whole weekend with my family.
s_famill_1.text_lu: Ech plannen den ganzen Weekend mat menger Famill ze verbréngen.

s_famill_1.text_en: Family is the most important thing for most people in life.
s_famill_1.text_lu: D'Famill ass déi wichtegst Saach am Liewen fir déi meescht Leit.

s_elteren_1.text_en: My parents live in a small town near the German border.
s_elteren_1.text_lu: Méi Pai wunnen an enger klenger Stad bei der däitscher Grenz.

s_elteren_1.text_en: I call my parents every Sunday evening to catch up.
s_elteren_1.text_lu: Sonndes Owend ruff ech all Kéier meng Elteren un, fir ze schwätzen.

s_mamm_1.text_en: My mother is a very kind and caring person.
s_mamm_1.text_lu: Mamm ass e ganz kënschlech a këmmerech Mënsch.

s_mamm_1.text_en: I bought some beautiful flowers for my mother's birthday.
s_mamm_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e puer schéin Blummen fir de Gebuertsdag vu menger Mamm kaaft.

s_papp_1.text_en: My father works as a doctor in the local hospital.
s_papp_1.text_lu: Mäi Papp schafft als Dokter am lokalen Spital.

s_papp_1.text_en: I like to go fishing with my father during the summer.
s_papp_1.text_lu: Ech gär mat mengem Papp fëschen am Summer.

s_brudder_1.text_en: My older brother is studying engineering at the university.
s_brudder_1.text_lu: Mäi groussen Brudder studéiert Ingenieurswiesen op der Uni.

s_brudder_1.text_en: I have two brothers who are both younger than me.
s_brudder_1.text_lu: Ech hunn zwee Bréider, déi béid jonk sinn wéi ech.

s_schwëster_1.text_en: My sister is a very talented artist and sells her paintings.
s_schwëster_1.text_lu: Meng Schwëster ass eng ganz talentéiert Kënschtlerin a verkaaft hir Biller.

s_schwëster_1.text_en: I am going to visit my sister in the city this afternoon.
s_schwëster_1.text_lu: Ech wäert mäi Schwëster am Stad Kuerz no Mëtteg besichen.

s_frënd_1.text_en: I have known my best friend since we were in primary school.
s_frënd_1.text_lu: Ech kennen mäi beschten Frënd zanter mir an der Primärschoul waren.

s_frënd_1.text_en: A true friend is someone who is always there for you.
s_frënd_1.text_lu: E richteg Frënd ass een, deen ëmmer fir Iech do ass.

s_komerod_1.text_en: We were close comrades during our time in the military.
s_komerod_1.text_lu: Mir waren enger Kolleg während eiser Zäit am Militär.

s_komerod_1.text_en: He is a very reliable comrade who always helps others.
s_komerod_1.text_lu: Hie ass e ganz vertrauenswürdigen Kamerad, deen ëmmer aneren hëlleft.

s_noper_1.text_en: Our neighbors are very nice and always say hello to us.
s_noper_1.text_lu: Eis Noperen sinn ganz sympatesch a seet eis ëmmer Moien.

s_noper_1.text_en: I borrowed some sugar from my neighbor this morning.
s_noper_1.text_lu: Ech hu mir Kéis vu mengem Noper ugeléint.

s_leit_1.text_en: There were a lot of people waiting at the bus station today.
s_leit_1.text_lu: Et waren haut vill Leit, déi op de Busstation gewaart hunn.

s_leit_1.text_en: People in this city are generally very friendly and helpful.
s_leit_1.text_lu: D'Leit an dëser Stad sinn allgemeng ganz frëndlech an hëllefsbereet.

s_numm_1.text_en: What is your full name and where do you come from?
s_numm_1.text_lu: Wat ass Ären komplette Vir- a Familljennumm a wou kënnt Dir hier?

s_numm_1.text_en: Please write your name clearly on the top of the paper.
s_numm_1.text_lu: Schreift wgl. Ären Numm ganz kläer op de Spëtz vum Pabeier.

s_alter_1.text_en: At what age did you begin to learn a second language?
s_alter_1.text_lu: An op wat Alter hunn ech eng zweete Sprooch geléiert?

s_alter_1.text_en: Age is just a number, what matters is how you feel.
s_alter_1.text_lu: D'Alter ass just eng Zuel, wat zielt ass, wéi Dir Iech fillt.

s_gebuertsdag_1.text_en: When is your birthday and what are your plans for it?
s_gebuertsdag_1.text_lu: Wann ass Ären Gebuertsdag a wat sinn Är Pläne fir en?

s_gebuertsdag_1.text_en: I am having a small party for my birthday this weekend.
s_gebuertsdag_1.text_lu: Ech ginn eng kleng Party fir mäi Gebuertsdag dëse Weekend.

s_gléck_1.text_en: I wish you the best of luck with your new job.
s_gléck_1.text_lu: Ech wënschen Iech alles Gutt fir Är nei Aarbecht.

s_gléck_1.text_en: Happiness is finding joy in the small things of life.
s_gléck_1.text_lu: Gléck ass, Freude an den klengen Dingen vum Liewen ze fannen.

s_léift_1.text_en: Love is a powerful feeling that brings people together.
s_léift_1.text_lu: D'Léift ass e mächteg Gefill dat d'Leit zesummenbréngt.

s_léift_1.text_en: He wrote many beautiful poems about his love for nature.
s_léift_1.text_lu: Hie schreift vill schéin Gedichter iwwer seng Léift fir d'Natur.

s_angscht_1.text_en: You should not let fear prevent you from trying new things.
s_angscht_1.text_lu: Dir sollt net erlaaben, datt d'Angscht Iech dovun abhält, nei Saachen ze probéieren.

s_angscht_1.text_en: The child has a fear of the dark and needs a nightlight.
s_angscht_1.text_lu: De Kand huet Angscht virun der Däischtert a brauch e Nachtlicht.

s_hoffnung_1.text_en: I have great hope for the future of our planet.
s_hoffnung_1.text_lu: Ech hunn grouss Hoffnung fir d'Zukunft vun eisem Planéit.

s_hoffnung_1.text_en: Hope is what keeps us going during difficult times.
s_hoffnung_1.text_lu: D'Hoffnung ass wat eis am grousse Ganzen am Liewen weiderféiert.

s_dram_1.text_en: It has always been my dream to travel around the world.
s_dram_1.text_lu: Et war ëmmer meng Dreem, ronderëm d'Welt ze reesen.

s_dram_1.text_en: I had a very strange dream about a flying elephant last night.
s_dram_1.text_lu: Ech huet laascht Nuecht e ganz verstéierend Dreem iwwer en fliegenden Elefant.

s_gefill_1.text_en: I have a gut feeling that everything will turn out well.
s_gefill_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e gudd Gefill, datt alles gutt wäert ausgoen.

s_gefill_1.text_en: It is a wonderful feeling to help someone in need.
s_gefill_1.text_lu: Et ass e wonnerbart Gefill, eemend an Nout ze hëllefen.

s_kierper_1.text_en: It is important to keep your body healthy and active.
s_kierper_1.text_lu: Et ass wichteg, Äre Kierper gesond an aktiv ze halen.

s_kierper_1.text_en: Your body needs rest and nutrition to function properly.
s_kierper_1.text_lu: Äre Kierper brauch Rou an Ernährung fir korrekt ze funktionéieren.

s_kopp_1.text_en: I have a slight headache and need to rest for a while.
s_kopp_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e liichte Kappschmerz a muss e bësschen roen.

s_kopp_1.text_en: Please keep your head up and stay positive during this time.
s_kopp_1.text_lu: Bleift positiv an hält den Kopf héich während dëser Zäit.

s_hand_1.text_en: Please hold my hand when we cross the busy street.
s_hand_1.text_lu: Bitte, halt meng Hand wéi mir déi grouss Strooss iwwerquere wäerten.

s_hand_1.text_en: I burned my hand slightly while I was cooking dinner.
s_hand_1.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Hand liicht verbrannt wéi ech Iessen gekocht hunn.

s_fouss_1.text_en: I hurt my foot while I was playing football yesterday.
s_fouss_1.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Fouss verletzt wéi ech gëschter Foussball gespillt hunn.

s_fouss_1.text_en: We went for a walk on foot through the city center.
s_fouss_1.text_lu: Mir sinn zu Fouss duerch d'Stad gelaf.

s_aen_1.text_en: She has very beautiful eyes that sparkle when she smiles.
s_aen_1.text_lu: Si huet ganz schéin Aen, déi faarwen, wann se lächelt.

s_aen_1.text_en: Please close your eyes and try to relax for a moment.
s_aen_1.text_lu: Maach d'Ae zou a probéier e Moment ze relaxéieren.

s_oueren_1.text_en: I can't hear you properly, I have a problem with my ears.
s_oueren_1.text_lu: Ech kann Iech net richteg héieren, ech hunn e Problem mat mäi Oueren.

s_oueren_1.text_en: Rabbits have very long ears that help them to hear well.
s_oueren_1.text_lu: Rabbits hunn ganz laang Oueren, déi hëlleft, gutt ze héieren.

s_nues_1.text_en: I have a runny nose because I caught a cold yesterday.
s_nues_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e flosseg Nas, well ech gëschter e Kal gehuet hunn.

s_nues_1.text_en: The dog has a very good nose and can follow a scent.
s_nues_1.text_lu: De Hond huet e ganz gudde Nas an kann engem Geruch folgen.

s_mond_1.text_en: Please open your mouth so the doctor can take a look.
s_mond_1.text_lu: Ouvert Äre Mond sou dass de Dokter kënnt kucken.

s_mond_1.text_en: Keep your mouth closed while you are chewing your food.
s_mond_1.text_lu: Halt Äre Mond zou wärend Dir Ären Iessen kaust.

s_hoer_1.text_en: She has long blonde hair that reaches down to her waist.
s_hoer_1.text_lu: Si huet laang blond Hoer, dat bis zu der Taille réicht.

s_hoer_1.text_en: I need to get my hair cut before the party next week.
s_hoer_1.text_lu: Ech muss mengen Hoer schneiden loossen virun der Party nächster Woch.

s_blutt_1.text_en: The doctor took a blood sample to check my health.
s_blutt_1.text_lu: De Dokter huet e Bluttproov geholl fir mäi Gesondheet ze kontrolléieren.

s_blutt_1.text_en: Blood is vital for carrying oxygen to the whole body.
s_blutt_1.text_lu: Blutt ass vital fir Sauerstoff an de ganze Kierper ze transportéieren.

s_gesondheet_1.text_en: Health is more important than wealth for most people.
s_gesondheet_1.text_lu: Gesondheet ass fir déi meescht Leit méi wichteg wéi Räichtum.

s_gesondheet_1.text_en: I am in very good health thanks to regular exercise.
s_gesondheet_1.text_lu: Ech sinn an exzellenter Form dank regelméisseg Exercice.

s_krankheet_1.text_en: The flu is a very common illness during the winter.
s_krankheet_1.text_lu: D'Grip ass eng ganz gewëssenlech Krankheet am Wanter.

s_krankheet_1.text_en: He recovered quickly from his illness and is back at work.
s_krankheet_1.text_lu: Hie recuperéiert séier vu senger Krankheet a schafft erëm.

s_dokter_1.text_en: You should see a doctor if your symptoms get worse.
s_dokter_1.text_lu: Sollt Äre Symptomer verschlechteren, sollt Dir e Dokter konsultéieren.

s_dokter_1.text_en: The doctor explained the results of the tests to me.
s_dokter_1.text_lu: De Dokter huet mir d'Resultater vun de Tester erkläert.

s_spidol_1.text_en: The new hospital is equipped with the latest technology.
s_spidol_1.text_lu: De neien Spëttel ass equipéiert mat der leschter Technologie.

s_spidol_1.text_en: He had to stay in the hospital for a week after the surgery.
s_spidol_1.text_lu: Hie gouf nach eng Woch am Spital gebleift, nodeems hie operéiert gouf.

s_apdikt_1.text_en: I need to go to the pharmacy to buy some medicine.
s_apdikt_1.text_lu: Ech muss an d'Apotheek goen, fir e Medikament ze kafen.

s_apdikt_1.text_en: The pharmacy is located just around the corner from here.
s_apdikt_1.text_lu: D'Apotheek ass just um Eck dovu.

s_essen_1.text_en: What would you like to have for dinner this evening?
s_essen_1.text_lu: Wat wëllt Dir amowend fir Iessen?

s_essen_1.text_en: The food at the restaurant was delicious and well prepared.
s_essen_1.text_lu: D'Essen am Restaurant war lecker a gutt virbereet.

s_drénken_1.text_en: I drink a cup of hot tea every morning at breakfast.
s_drénken_1.text_lu: All Moien beim Frühstück drénken ech eng Tasse waarmen Téi.

s_drénken_1.text_en: What would you like to drink with your meal today?
s_drénken_1.text_lu: Wat wëllt Dir bei Ärem Iessen drénken?

s_brout_1.text_en: I buy fresh bread from the bakery every single day.
s_brout_1.text_lu: Ech kaafen all Dag frëschen Brout bei der Bäckerei.

s_brout_1.text_en: Would you like some bread with your soup tonight?
s_brout_1.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e Stéck Brout zu Ärem Suppe haut Awend?

s_mëllech_1.text_en: I take my coffee with a little bit of cold milk.
s_mëllech_1.text_lu: Ech drénken meng Kaffi mat engem klengen Zousaz kaler Mëllech.

s_mëllech_1.text_en: Do you want some milk with your cereal this morning?
s_mëllech_1.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e bëssen Mëllech mat Ärem Cereal dëse Moien?

s_kaffi_1.text_en: I love the smell of freshly brewed coffee in the morning.
s_kaffi_1.text_lu: Ech hunn gär den Duft vu frësch gebréngtem Kaffi am Moien.

s_kaffi_1.text_en: Would you like some coffee or would you prefer tea?
s_kaffi_1.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e Kaffi oder wëllt Dir léiwer Téi?

s_téi_1.text_en: I like to drink a cup of green tea in the afternoon.
s_téi_1.text_lu: Ech gär e Glas Gréng Té am Nomëtteg drénken.

s_téi_1.text_en: He prefers tea with lemon and honey to milk and sugar.
s_téi_1.text_lu: Hie preferéiert Téi mat Zitrone a Mieles zu Mëllech a Sucre.

s_béier_1.text_en: He ordered a cold beer after a long day of hard work.
s_béier_1.text_lu: Hie bestellt e kalen Bier no engem laangen Dag vun haarder Aarbecht.

s_béier_1.text_en: There are many local types of beer in this country.
s_béier_1.text_lu: Et gëtt vill lokal Biersorten an dësem Land.

s_wäin_1.text_en: The Moselle region is famous for its high quality wines.
s_wäin_1.text_lu: D'Moselle-Regioun ass berühmt fir hir Wäiner vu qualitativ héijer Qualitéit.

s_wäin_1.text_en: Would you like a glass of red wine with your dinner?
s_wäin_1.text_lu: Wëllt Dir e Glas rout Wäin zu Ärem Dinner?

s_fleesch_1.text_en: I don't eat meat because I am a strict vegetarian.
s_fleesch_1.text_lu: Ech iessen kee Fleesch, well ech e strikte Vegetarier sinn.

s_fleesch_1.text_en: The meat was very tender and cooked to perfection.
s_fleesch_1.text_lu: D'Fleesch war ganz zart a perfekt gekacht.

s_fësch_1.text_en: I am planning to cook fish with vegetables for dinner tonight.
s_fësch_1.text_lu: Ech plannen, fir Kuele fir Iessen haut owes Fësch mat Geméis ze kachen.

s_fësch_1.text_en: There are many colorful tropical fish in the large aquarium.
s_fësch_1.text_lu: Et gëtt vill faarweg, tropesche Fësch an dem groussen Aquarium.

s_geméis_1.text_en: It is important to eat a variety of fresh vegetables.
s_geméis_1.text_lu: Et ass wichteg, eng Varietéit u frëschen Gemüser ze iessen.

s_geméis_1.text_en: I grow my own vegetables in a small garden at home.
s_geméis_1.text_lu: Ech züchten meng eegen Geméis an engem klengen Gaart doheem.

s_uebst_1.text_en: I like to eat a piece of fruit for my afternoon snack.
s_uebst_1.text_lu: Ech gär e Stéck Frucht als Vëftegessen.

s_uebst_1.text_en: There is a wide variety of tropical fruit in the market.
s_uebst_1.text_lu: Et gëtt eng grouss Varietéit u tropesche Fruucht op dem Maart.

s_apel_1.text_en: An apple a day keeps the doctor away, so they say.
s_apel_1.text_lu: Ee Pomme am Dag hält de Dokter ewech, sou seet een.

s_apel_1.text_en: I bought a bag of red apples from the local farmer.
s_apel_1.text_lu: Ech hunn eng Kéngrout roude Äppel beim lokale Bauer kaaft.

s_banann_1.text_en: He ate a banana for breakfast before he went running.
s_banann_1.text_lu: Hie gouf e Banann zum Frëhstéck, ier hie lafen ass.

s_banann_1.text_en: Bananas are a great source of potassium and energy.
s_banann_1.text_lu: Bananen sinn eng super Quell u Kalium a Energie.

s_zocker_1.text_en: I take my coffee without any sugar or sweeteners.
s_zocker_1.text_lu: Ech drénken meng Kaffi ouni Sucren oder Süsstoff.

s_zocker_1.text_en: Too much sugar is not healthy for your body or teeth.
s_zocker_1.text_lu: Ze vill Suess ass net gesond fir Äre Kierper oder Är Zänn.

s_salz_1.text_en: The soup needs a little bit more salt and pepper.
s_salz_1.text_lu: D'Supp brauch e bësse méi Salz a Pfeffer.

s_salz_1.text_en: I prefer to use sea salt when I am cooking at home.
s_salz_1.text_lu: Ech preferéiere Miersalz ze benotzen wann ech doheem kachen.

s_ueleg_1.text_en: I use olive oil for cooking and for my salads.
s_ueleg_1.text_lu: Ech benotzen Olivenöl zum Kachen a fir meng Salaten.

s_ueleg_1.text_en: The oil in the car needs to be changed regularly.
s_ueleg_1.text_lu: L'Huile an der Auto muss regelméisseg gewechselt ginn.

s_botter_1.text_en: I like to eat fresh bread with a little bit of butter.
s_botter_1.text_lu: Ech gär frëschen Brout mat e bëssen Botter iessen.

s_botter_1.text_en: Butter is a key ingredient in many traditional recipes.
s_botter_1.text_lu: Butter ass e Schlësselbestanddeel an e vill traditionell Rezepter.

s_kéis_1.text_en: They offer a wide variety of local and imported cheeses.
s_kéis_1.text_lu: Si bidden eng breet Palette u lokalen a importéierten Käser.

s_kéis_1.text_en: Would you like some cheese and crackers after dinner?
s_kéis_1.text_lu: Wëllt Dir no Iessen e Stéck Kéis a Cracker?

s_eeër_1.text_en: I had two fried eggs for breakfast this morning.
s_eeër_1.text_lu: Ech hunn zwee Spiegeleier zum Frühstück e Mueren gehat.

s_eeër_1.text_en: Eggs are very versatile and can be used in many ways.
s_eeër_1.text_lu: Eeër sinn ganz versatile a kënne op vill Manéieren benotzt ginn.

s_nuddelen_1.text_en: I am planning to cook pasta with tomato sauce tonight.
s_nuddelen_1.text_lu: Ech plannen haut Abei Pasta mat Tomatensauce ze kachen.

s_nuddelen_1.text_en: Noodles are a staple food in many different cultures.
s_nuddelen_1.text_lu: Nudelen sinn e Basisliewensmëttel a ville verschiddene Kulturen.

s_zopp_1.text_en: Tomato soup is my favorite thing to eat when it is cold.
s_zopp_1.text_lu: Tomatesopp ass mäi Liiblingsiessen wann et kal ass.

s_zopp_1.text_en: The soup was very flavorful and filled with vegetables.
s_zopp_1.text_lu: D'Supp war ganz schmaachdeg a gefëllt mat Geméis.

s_mëttegiessen_1.text_en: We usually eat our lunch together at twelve o'clock.
s_mëttegiessen_1.text_lu: Mir iessen normalerweis gemeinsam Mëtte bei zwielef Auer.

s_mëttegiessen_1.text_en: What did you have for lunch at the office today?
s_mëttegiessen_1.text_lu: Wat hutt Dir haut am Büro zum Mëtteessen geholl?

s_owendiessen_1.text_en: I am meeting some friends for dinner this evening.
s_owendiessen_1.text_lu: An dësem Owend treffen ech e puer Frënden zum Dinner.

s_owendiessen_1.text_en: What are we having for dinner tonight at home?
s_owendiessen_1.text_lu: Wat gëtt et haut owes zum Dinner doheem?

s_duuscht_1.text_en: I had a great thirst after running in the hot sun.
s_duuscht_1.text_lu: Ech hat e grousse Durst nodeem ech an der héijer Sonn gelaf war.

s_duuscht_1.text_en: Water is the best thing to drink when you are thirsty.
s_duuscht_1.text_lu: Waat ass dat Bescht wat een drénke kann, wann een Durst huet.

s_gär_1.text_en: I like to read books and listen to music in my free time.
s_gär_1.text_lu: An mengem Fräizäit gär ech Bicher liesen an Musek lauschteren.

s_gär_1.text_en: He would really like to visit Japan one day in the future.
s_gär_1.text_lu: Hien wéilt gär eng Kéier an der Zukunft Japan besichen.

s_lecker_1.text_en: The cake was so delicious that I had a second piece.
s_lecker_1.text_lu: De Kichel war esou lecker, dass ech e zweete Stéck geholl hunn.

s_lecker_1.text_en: That was a very tasty meal, thank you for the invite.
s_lecker_1.text_lu: Dat war e ganz leckere Mëttegessen, merci fir d'Invitatioun.

s_sauer_1.text_en: The lemon is very sour and makes me squint my eyes.
s_sauer_1.text_lu: De Zitroun ass ganz sauer a mécht, dass ech meng Aen zouknëppere.

s_sauer_1.text_en: I like the sour taste of pickles with my sandwich.
s_sauer_1.text_lu: Ech gär den sauer Goût vun Ärem Sandwich mat Gurken.

s_séiss_1.text_en: The dessert was very sweet and topped with cream.
s_séiss_1.text_lu: De Dessert war ganz séiss a mat Crème iwwerzuckert.

s_séiss_1.text_en: He has a sweet tooth and loves all kinds of candy.
s_séiss_1.text_lu: Hien huet e Schwéierpunkt fir Séissegkeeten a gär all Zorte vu Bonbons.

s_salzeg_1.text_en: The popcorn was a bit too salty for my personal taste.
s_salzeg_1.text_lu: De Popcorn war e bëssen ze salzeg fir mäi perséinlechen Goût.

s_salzeg_1.text_en: I prefer salty snacks like nuts and chips to sweets.
s_salzeg_1.text_lu: Ech preferéiere salzeg Snacks wéi Noss a Chips zu Séisswaren.

s_schoul_1.text_en: The new primary school will open in our neighborhood.
s_schoul_1.text_lu: D'nei Primärschoul wäert an eisem Quartier opmaachen.

s_schoul_1.text_en: I have some very fond memories of my time at school.
s_schoul_1.text_lu: Ech hunn ganz schéi Erënnerungen un mäi Zäit an der Schoul.

s_klass_1.text_en: There are twenty-five students in my daughter's class.
s_klass_1.text_lu: Et gëtt 25 Schüler an der Klass vu mäi Duechter.

s_klass_1.text_en: Our class is going on a field trip to the museum today.
s_klass_1.text_lu: Eis Klass geet haut op Exkursioun an de Musée.

s_léierpersonal_1.text_en: The teaching staff at the university is very experienced.
s_léierpersonal_1.text_lu: De Personal vun der Universitéit ass ganz expérimenté.

s_léierpersonal_1.text_en: I have a lot of respect for the work of school teachers.
s_léierpersonal_1.text_lu: Ech hunn ganz vill Respekt fir d'Aarbecht vun de Schoulmeeschteren.

s_schüler_1.text_en: The students are busy preparing for their final exams.
s_schüler_1.text_lu: D'Schüler sinn amgaang sech op hir final Examen virzebereeden.

s_schüler_1.text_en: Every student is expected to attend all of the classes.
s_schüler_1.text_lu: All Kandidate sinn erwaart, all Coursen ze besichen.

s_buch_1.text_en: I have just finished reading a very interesting book.
s_buch_1.text_lu: Ech hunn grad e ganz interessant Buch gelies.

s_buch_1.text_en: This book provides a lot of information about history.
s_buch_1.text_lu: Dëst Buch bitt vill Informatiounen iwwer d'Geschicht.

s_heft_1.text_en: Please write the notes for the lesson in your notebook.
s_heft_1.text_lu: Schreift d'Notizen fir d'Lektioun an Ärem Notizbuch op.

s_heft_1.text_en: I have a special notebook where I keep all of my ideas.
s_heft_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e speziellen Notizbuch, an deem ech all meng Ideen notéieren.

s_stëft_1.text_en: Can I borrow a pen to sign this important document?
s_stëft_1.text_lu: Kann ech e Stëft léinen, fir dëst wichtegt Dokument ze ënnerschreiwen?

s_stëft_1.text_en: I prefer writing with a pencil because I can erase it.
s_stëft_1.text_lu: Ech preferéieren mat engem Bleistift ze schreiwen, well ech et ausradéieren kann.

s_sprooch_1.text_en: Learning a new language opens up many opportunities.
s_sprooch_1.text_lu: Ech léieren eng nei Sprooch opmaachen vill Méiglechkeeten.

s_sprooch_1.text_en: How many languages can you speak fluently right now?
s_sprooch_1.text_lu: Wéi vill Sproochen kanns du elo fléissend schwätzen?
