s_rees_1.text_en: The journey to the city takes about two hours by fast train.
s_rees_1.text_lu: D'Rees an d'Stad dauert ongeféier zwou Stonnen mat dem Schnellzuch.

s_rees_1.text_en: Travel broadens the mind and provides many new experiences.
s_rees_1.text_lu: Reesen erweidert de Geescht a bitt vill nei Erfahrungen.

s_kaart_1.text_en: Can you please show me the location of the hotel on the map?
s_kaart_1.text_lu: Kënnt Dir mir wgl. op der Map de Standuert vum Hotel weisen?

s_kaart_1.text_en: I bought a map of the city from the tourist information office.
s_kaart_1.text_lu: Ech hunn eng Kaart vun der Stad am Tourist-Informatiounsbüro kaaft.

s_ticket_1.text_en: I need to buy a ticket for the train journey to Berlin.
s_ticket_1.text_lu: Ech muss e Billet fir d'Rees mat dem Zong op Berlin kaafen.

s_ticket_1.text_en: How much does a return ticket to the city center cost today?
s_ticket_1.text_lu: Wéi vill kascht e Retourbiljet an de Stadzentrum haut?

s_hotel_1.text_en: We stayed in a very nice hotel near the center of the city.
s_hotel_1.text_lu: Mir hunn an engem ganz schéonen Hotel bei der Stad gebleit.

s_hotel_1.text_en: Is the breakfast included in the price of the hotel room?
s_hotel_1.text_lu: Ass de Frühstück am Präis vum Hotelzëmmer abegraff?

s_sëtz_1.text_en: Please take a seat and wait for a moment in the hallway.
s_sëtz_1.text_lu: Prenez place et attendez un instant dans le couloir.

s_sëtz_1.text_en: The window seat is my favorite place to sit on the train.
s_sëtz_1.text_lu: De Sëtz am Fënster ass mäi Liiblingsplaz am Zuch.

s_luucht_1.text_en: Please turn on the light because it is getting dark in here.
s_luucht_1.text_lu: Maach wgl. d'Luucht un, well et gëtt dëstéis duerch d'Däischter.

s_luucht_1.text_en: The light was coming from the candle on the dining table.
s_luucht_1.text_lu: D'Liicht koum vun der Kéierl op dem Esstësch.

s_feier_1.text_en: We sat by the fire and talked until the early morning hours.
s_feier_1.text_lu: Mir sëtzen am Feer an hunn bis an d'fréi Moienstunden geschwat.

s_feier_1.text_en: The fire department arrived quickly to put out the small fire.
s_feier_1.text_lu: D'Pompiers sinn séier ukomm fir de klengen Brand ze läschen.

s_äerd_1.text_en: The Earth is the only planet that we know has life on it.
s_äerd_1.text_lu: D'Äerd ass den eenzegen Planéit, op deem et Liewen gëtt, wéi mir wëssen.

s_äerd_1.text_en: Protecting the environment is vital for the future of Earth.
s_äerd_1.text_lu: Den Schutz vun der Ëmwelt ass vital fir d'Zukunft vun der Äerd.

s_steen_1.text_en: The old wall was built of heavy stones from the river.
s_steen_1.text_lu: Den ale Wall war aus schwéieren Steng gebaut, déi aus dem Floss stamen.

s_steen_1.text_en: He threw a small stone into the lake and watched the ripples.
s_steen_1.text_lu: Hie geworfen e klenge Stee an de Séi a kucke wéi d'Wellen sech verbreeden.

s_sand_1.text_en: The children were playing in the sand on the beach all day.
s_sand_1.text_lu: D'Kanner hunn de ganzen Dag am Sand um Strand gespillt.

s_sand_1.text_en: The sand was very hot under the sun during the afternoon.
s_sand_1.text_lu: De Sand war de Mëttegen ganz waarm an der Sonn.

s_metall_1.text_en: The gate is made of solid metal and is very heavy to move.
s_metall_1.text_lu: D'Porte ass aus massivem Metall a si ass ganz schwéier ze beweegen.

s_metall_1.text_en: Gold and silver are two of the most valuable types of metal.
s_metall_1.text_lu: Gold a Sëlwer sinn zwee vun de wäertvollste Metalltypen.

s_holz_1.text_en: The table is made of solid oak wood and will last for years.
s_holz_1.text_lu: D'Tisch ass aus massivem Eichenholz gefertigt a wäert Joerzéngte laang halen.

s_holz_1.text_en: We used some wood to build a fire and stay warm tonight.
s_holz_1.text_lu: Mir hunn e bëssen Holz benotzt fir e Feier ze bauen an waarm ze bleiwen dës Nuecht.

s_glas_1.text_en: Please be careful with the glass door, it is very fragile.
s_glas_1.text_lu: Bitte passt op d'Glasdier op, et ass ganz brisant.

s_glas_1.text_en: I broke a window glass while I was playing ball outside.
s_glas_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e Fënsterglas gebrochen wéi ech dobaussen Ball gespillt hunn.

s_plastik_1.text_en: We should all try to use less plastic to help the planet.
s_plastik_1.text_lu: Mir sollten all probéieren, wéineger Plastik ze benotzen, fir de Planéit ze hëllefen.

s_plastik_1.text_en: The toy is made of durable plastic and is safe for kids.
s_plastik_1.text_lu: De Spillsaach ass aus robustem Plastik gefertigt a siicht fir Kanner sécher.

s_form_1.text_en: What is the shape of the building on the corner over there?
s_form_1.text_lu: Wéi ass d'Form vum Gebai an der Eck do?

s_form_1.text_en: I am currently out of shape and need to start exercising more.
s_form_1.text_lu: Ech sinn momentan a schlechter Form a muss méi Sport treiben.

s_krees_1.text_en: The children were sitting in a large circle on the floor.
s_krees_1.text_lu: D'Kanner sassen an engem groussen Krees um Buedem.

s_krees_1.text_en: Please draw a circle around the correct answer on the paper.
s_krees_1.text_lu: Kréizt de richtege Répons op der Pabeier.

s_quadrat_1.text_en: The room is a perfect square and has four large windows.
s_quadrat_1.text_lu: De Raum ass e perfekte Carré a gouf mat véier groussen Fënstere ausgestatt.

s_quadrat_1.text_en: Please check the square box if you agree with the statement.
s_quadrat_1.text_lu: Kruet wgl. de Karesch Këscht, wann Dir mat der Ausso averstannt.

s_linn_1.text_en: Wait here behind the yellow line for the next train to come.
s_linn_1.text_lu: Waart hei hanner der gieler Lënn bis den nächsten Zong kënnt.

s_linn_1.text_en: I have to write a few lines for my new project tonight.
s_linn_1.text_lu: Ech muss fir mäi neien Projet haut Awen e puer Zeilen schreiwen.

s_punkt_1.text_en: Wait for a moment, I have an important point to make now.
s_punkt_1.text_lu: Waart e Moment, ech hunn e wichtegen Punkt, deen ech elo muss maachen.

s_punkt_1.text_en: Put a full stop at the end of every complete sentence.
s_punkt_1.text_lu: Setzt e Punkt um Enn vun all komplettem Satz.

s_gréisst_1.text_en: What is the size of the room and how many windows does it have?
s_gréisst_1.text_lu: Wéi grouss ass de Raum a wéivill Fënstere huet et?

s_gréisst_1.text_en: I need a medium size jacket that is not too big or too small.
s_gréisst_1.text_lu: Ech brauch eng Jackett vu Mëttelgréiss, déi net ze grouss oder ze kleng ass.

s_gewiicht_1.text_en: What is the weight of the package that you want to send?
s_gewiicht_1.text_lu: Wat ass de Gewiicht vum Package, deen Dir schécken wëllt?

s_gewiicht_1.text_en: Losing weight is a difficult task that requires a lot of patience.
s_gewiicht_1.text_lu: Gewenner ofzebréngen ass eng schwéier Aufgab, déi vill Gedold erfierdert.

s_héicht_1.text_en: What is the total height of the Eiffel Tower in Paris?
s_héicht_1.text_lu: Wat ass d'total Héicht vum Eiffeltuerm zu Paräis?

s_héicht_1.text_en: He has a fear of heights and avoids going up tall buildings.
s_héicht_1.text_lu: Hien huet Angscht vir Héicht a vermeit et, an héich Gebaier ze goen.

s_längt_1.text_en: The length of the river is over two hundred kilometers.
s_längt_1.text_lu: D'Längt vum Floss ass méi wéi zwee Honnert Kilometer.

s_längt_1.text_en: What is the total length of the movie? I hope it is short.
s_längt_1.text_lu: Wat ass d'total Längt vum Film? Ech hoffen et ass kuerz.

s_breet_1.text_en: The width of the road is not sufficient for two large trucks.
s_breet_1.text_lu: D'Breet vun der Strooss ass net suffizient fir zwee grouss Camionen.

s_breet_1.text_en: The painting has a width of one meter and is very beautiful.
s_breet_1.text_lu: De Tableau huet eng Breet vun engem Meter a ass ganz schéin.

s_déift_1.text_en: The depth of the lake is over fifty meters in some parts.
s_déift_1.text_lu: D'Déift vum Séi ass an e puer Deeler iwwer fënnefzéng Meter.

s_déift_1.text_en: We dived to a depth of ten meters to see the colorful fish.
s_déift_1.text_lu: Mir sinn op eng Déift vu zéng Meter ofgestouss fir déi faarweg Fësch ze gesinn.

s_geroch_1.text_en: The smell of freshly baked bread was coming from the kitchen.
s_geroch_1.text_lu: De Geroch vu frësch gebakene Brout koum aus der Kichen.

s_geroch_1.text_en: I really like the smell of coffee early in the morning.
s_geroch_1.text_lu: Ech mooss gär den Geruch vu Kaffi am Fréi am Moien.

s_goût_1.text_en: I like the sweet taste of the fruit that I bought today.
s_goût_1.text_lu: Ech gär den séissen Goût vum Uebst, dat ech haut kaaft hunn.

s_goût_1.text_en: That was a very tasty meal, thank you for the invitation.
s_goût_1.text_lu: Dat war e ganz leckere Mëttegessen, merci fir d'Invitatioun.

s_geräisch_1.text_en: I heard a strange noise coming from the garden last night.
s_geräisch_1.text_lu: Ech hunn laascht Nuecht e komeschen Geräusch aus dem Gaart komm.

s_geräisch_1.text_en: The noise of the traffic made it difficult for me to sleep.
s_geräisch_1.text_lu: De Lärm vum Verkéier huet et mir schwéier gemaach, ze schlafen.

s_stëmm_1.text_en: She has a very soft and pleasant voice that I like a lot.
s_stëmm_1.text_lu: Si huet eng ganz mëll a prett Stëmm, déi ech ganz gär hunn.

s_stëmm_1.text_en: I recognized his voice immediately when he began speaking.
s_stëmm_1.text_lu: Ech hu seng Stëmm direkt erkannt, wéi hien ugefaang huet ze schwätzen.

s_schlof_1.text_en: I had a very good night's sleep and feel refreshed today.
s_schlof_1.text_lu: Ech hunn ganz gutt geschlof an ech feelen meech frësch haut.

s_schlof_1.text_en: The baby is in a deep sleep, so please keep the room quiet.
s_schlof_1.text_lu: De Béi ass an engem déife Schlof, also bleift wgl. roueg am Raum.

s_gedanken_1.text_en: What are your thoughts on the current situation in the city?
s_gedanken_1.text_lu: Wat ass Är Meenung zur aktueller Situatioun an der Stad?

s_gedanken_1.text_en: I have many thoughts about our future plans and projects.
s_gedanken_1.text_lu: Ech hunn vill Gedanken iwwer eis zukünfteg Pläne a Projeten.

s_iddi_1.text_en: That is a great idea, we should definitely try it out soon.
s_iddi_1.text_lu: Dat ass eng super Idee, mir sollten et definitiv bald ausprobéieren.

s_iddi_1.text_en: I have an idea for a new game that we can play together.
s_iddi_1.text_lu: Ech hunn eng Iddi fir e neit Spill, dat mir zesummen spille kënnen.

s_plang_1.text_en: What is your plan for the upcoming long holiday weekend?
s_plang_1.text_lu: Wat ass Äre Plang fir de kommenden laangen Feierdeeg?

s_plang_1.text_en: We need to develop a detailed plan to achieve our goals.
s_plang_1.text_lu: Mir mussen e detailléierte Plang entwéckelen, fir eis Ziler ze erreechen.

s_zil_1.text_en: Our primary objective is to improve the quality of the product.
s_zil_1.text_lu: Eis primäre Objektiv ass et, d'Qualitéit vum Produkt ze verbesseren.

s_zil_1.text_en: He finally reached his goal after years of hard and dedicated work.
s_zil_1.text_lu: No Joren uechter an engagéierter Aarbecht huet hie schliesslech säin Zil erreecht.

s_erfolleg_1.text_en: Hard work and dedication are the keys to achieving success.
s_erfolleg_1.text_lu: Härde Aarbecht a Devotioun sinn de Schléissel fir Succès ze erreechen.

s_erfolleg_1.text_en: The launch of the new product was a great success for the company.
s_erfolleg_1.text_lu: De Lancéierung vum neien Produkt war e groussen Erfolleg fir d'Firma.

s_feeler_1.text_en: It is okay to make mistakes as long as you learn from them.
s_feeler_1.text_lu: Et ass okay, Feeler ze maachen, solang een dovun léiert.

s_feeler_1.text_en: I found a few errors in the final version of the report.
s_feeler_1.text_lu: Ech huet e puer Feeler an der finaler Versioun vum Rapport fonnt.

s_problem_1.text_en: We are working together to find a solution to this difficult problem.
s_problem_1.text_lu: Mir schaffen zesummen un enger Léisung fir dëst schwéiert Problem.

s_problem_1.text_en: If you have any problems, please don't hesitate to ask for help.
s_problem_1.text_lu: Wann Dir Problemer hutt, zéckt net, Hëllef ze froen.

s_léisung_1.text_en: Finding a solution to the complex problem took a lot of time.
s_léisung_1.text_lu: Et huet vill Zäit gedauert, eng Léisung fir dat komplex Problem ze fannen.

s_léisung_1.text_en: There is no simple solution to the current environmental crisis.
s_léisung_1.text_lu: Et gëtt keng einfach Léisung fir déi aktuell Umweltkris.

s_hëllef_1.text_en: Thank you very much for all your help and support today.
s_hëllef_1.text_lu: Merci villmol fir all Är Hëllef an Ënnerstëtzung haut.

s_hëllef_1.text_en: He is always ready to offer help to those who are in need.
s_hëllef_1.text_lu: Hie steet ëmmer parat, fir Hëllef un déi ze bidden, déi se brauchen.

s_ënnerstëtzung_1.text_en: I really appreciate the support I received from my family.
s_ënnerstëtzung_1.text_lu: Ech schätze wierklech d'Ënnerstëtzung, déi ech vu menger Famill kritt hunn.

s_ënnerstëtzung_1.text_en: The project was made possible thanks to the support of the community.
s_ënnerstëtzung_1.text_lu: De Projet war dank der Ënnerstëtzung vun der Gemeinschaft méiglech.

s_zesummenaarbecht_1.text_en: Collaboration between different departments is vital for success.
s_zesummenaarbecht_1.text_lu: Zesummenaarbecht tëscht de verschiddene Departementer ass vital fir de Succès.

s_zesummenaarbecht_1.text_en: We are looking forward to a productive cooperation with your team.
s_zesummenaarbecht_1.text_lu: Mir freien eis op eng produktiv Zesummenaarbecht mat Ärem Team.

s_konflikt_1.text_en: The two parties are trying to resolve their long conflict in peace.
s_konflikt_1.text_lu: Déi zwou Parteien probéieren hiren laange Konflikt am Fridden ze léisen.

s_konflikt_1.text_en: It is important to avoid conflict and promote mutual understanding.
s_konflikt_1.text_lu: Et ass wichteg Konflikter ze vermeiden an de gegenseitigen Verständnis ze förderen.

s_krich_1.text_en: War is a tragic event that causes a lot of suffering and loss.
s_krich_1.text_lu: Krich ass e traagescht Evenement dat vill Leid a Verloscht verursaacht.

s_krich_1.text_en: The two countries reached a peace agreement after years of war.
s_krich_1.text_lu: No Joren vum Krich hunn déi zwéi Länner e Fridensabkommen erreecht.

s_fridden_1.text_en: Peace is what everyone in the world desires and deserves.
s_fridden_1.text_lu: Fridden ass wat all Persoun an der Welt wënscht a verdéngt.

s_fridden_1.text_en: They are working together to promote peace and stability in the region.
s_fridden_1.text_lu: Si schaffen zesummen fir Fridden a Stabilitéit an der Regioun ze förderen.

s_fräiheet_1.text_en: Freedom of speech is a fundamental right in every democracy.
s_fräiheet_1.text_lu: D'Fräiheet vun der Ried ass e fundamentalt Recht an all Demokratie.

s_fräiheet_1.text_en: She felt a sense of freedom as she traveled around the world.
s_fräiheet_1.text_lu: Si huet e Gefill vu Fräiheet gespürt, wéi se ronderëm d'Welt gereest ass.

s_gerechtegkeet_1.text_en: Justice must be served for the victims of the recent crime.
s_gerechtegkeet_1.text_lu: D'Justiz muss fir d'Affer vum rezenten Verbrechen geschéien.

s_gerechtegkeet_1.text_en: We must all work together to achieve social justice and equality.
s_gerechtegkeet_1.text_lu: Mir mussen all zesummen schaffen, fir sozial Gerechtigkeit an Egalitéit ze erreechen.

s_wourecht_1.text_en: It is always better to tell the truth, even if it is difficult.
s_wourecht_1.text_lu: Et ass ëmmer besser, d'Wourecht ze soen, och wann et schwéier ass.

s_wourecht_1.text_en: I want to know the whole truth about what happened that night.
s_wourecht_1.text_lu: Ech wëll déi ganz Wourecht wëssen iwwer wat déi Nuecht passéiert ass.

s_ligen_1.text_en: Lying is never a good solution, it only causes more problems.
s_ligen_1.text_lu: Lügen ass ni eng gutt Léisung, et verursaacht nëmmen méi Problemer.

s_ligen_1.text_en: He was caught in a lie and had to face the consequences.
s_ligen_1.text_lu: Hie gouf erwischt an enger Lies a gouf d'Konsequenzen droen.

s_geescht_1.text_en: The spirit of the team remained strong despite the recent defeat.
s_geescht_1.text_lu: De Geescht vum Team ass trotz der rezenten Néierlag staark bliwwen.

s_geescht_1.text_en: He was a man of great spirit and determination in everything he did.
s_geescht_1.text_lu: Hie war e Mann vu grousser Geescht a Bestëmmung an all deem wat hie gemaacht huet.

s_séil_1.text_en: She put her whole heart and soul into her beautiful music.
s_séil_1.text_lu: Si huet hire ganz Häerz an hir ganz Séil an hir schéi Musek geluecht.

s_séil_1.text_en: Music is often described as the language of the human soul.
s_séil_1.text_lu: D'Musek gëtt oft als d'Sprach vun der mënschlecher Seel beschriwwen.

s_gott_1.text_en: The majestic cathedral was built to the glory of God many centuries ago.
s_gott_1.text_lu: De majestéise Kathedral gouf vir ville Joerhonnerte zum Louer vu Gott gebaut.

s_gott_1.text_en: He found peace and comfort in his faith in God during difficult times.
s_gott_1.text_lu: Hie fonn Fridden a Komfort an sengem Glawen u Gott an schwéieren Zäiten.

s_relioun_1.text_en: Religion plays a very important role in the lives of many people.
s_relioun_1.text_lu: D'Relioun spillt eng ganz wichteg Roll an de Liewen vu ville Leit.

s_relioun_1.text_en: We must respect the different religions and cultures in our world.
s_relioun_1.text_lu: Mir mussen déi verschidde Reliounen a Kulturen an eiser Welt respektéieren.

s_kultur_1.text_en: Luxembourg has a very rich and diverse culture and history.
s_kultur_1.text_lu: Lëtzebuerg huet eng ganz räich a divers Kultur an Geschicht.

s_kultur_1.text_en: I enjoy learning about the different cultures of the world.
s_kultur_1.text_lu: Ech genéissen et, iwwer déi verschidde Kulturen vun der Welt ze léieren.

s_traditioun_1.text_en: The annual festival is a tradition that dates back hundreds of years.
s_traditioun_1.text_lu: De jährleche Festival ass eng Traditioun, déi Hannerhonn bis zu honnert Joer zréckgeet.

s_traditioun_1.text_en: Maintaining local traditions is vital for our cultural identity.
s_traditioun_1.text_lu: D'Erhaltung vun de lokale Traditiounen ass vital fir eis kulturell Identitéit.

s_konscht_1.text_en: The city museum houses a very impressive collection of modern art.
s_konscht_1.text_lu: De Musée vun der Stad huet eng ganz impressionant Sammlung vu moderner Konscht.

s_konscht_1.text_en: Art is a way of expressing thoughts and feelings in many forms.
s_konscht_1.text_lu: Art ass e Mëttel fir Gedanken a Gefiller a ville Formen auszdrécken.

s_wëssenschaft_1.text_en: Science has provided us with many answers about the universe.
s_wëssenschaft_1.text_lu: D'Wëssenschaft huet eis vill Äntwerten iwwer den Universum ginn.

s_wëssenschaft_1.text_en: He has dedicated his whole life to the study of medical science.
s_wëssenschaft_1.text_lu: Hien huet säi ganz Liewen dem Studium vun der Medezin gewidmet.

s_technik_1.text_en: The rapid development of technology has changed the way we live.
s_technik_1.text_lu: D'rapid Entwécklung vun der Technologie huet d'Manéier wéi mir liewen, verännert.

s_technik_1.text_en: He is very interested in the technical aspects of the new machine.
s_technik_1.text_lu: Hien ass ganz interesséiert un den techneschen Aspekter vun der neier Maschinn.

s_industrie_1.text_en: The steel industry was historically very important for our country.
s_industrie_1.text_lu: D'Stahlindustrie war historesch ganz wichteg fir eise Land.

s_industrie_1.text_en: Innovation is the key to the future of the local industry.
s_industrie_1.text_lu: Innovatioun ass de Schlëssel fir d'Zukunft vun der lokaler Industrie.

s_landwirtschaft_1.text_en: Agriculture is a vital sector of the national economy.
s_landwirtschaft_1.text_lu: L'agriculture est un secteur vital de l'économie nationale.

s_landwirtschaft_1.text_en: Sustainable farming practices are important for the environment.
s_landwirtschaft_1.text_lu: Nachhalteg landwirtschaftliche Praktiken sinn wichteg fir d'Ëmwelt.

s_handel_1.text_en: Trade between different countries is important for global economy.
s_handel_1.text_lu: De Commerce tëscht verschiddene Länner ass wichteg fir d'global Wirtschaft.

s_handel_1.text_en: The city has been a center of commerce for many centuries.
s_handel_1.text_lu: D'Stad war fir vill Joerhonnerten e Handelszentrum.

s_service_1.text_en: The service in that restaurant was very friendly and efficient.
s_service_1.text_lu: De Service an deem Restaurant war ganz frëndlech an effizient.

s_service_1.text_en: Customer service is a top priority for our successful company.
s_service_1.text_lu: De Clientenservice ass eng Top-Prioritéit fir eise erfolgreichen Unternehmen.

s_politik_1.text_en: Politics is a complex and often controversial topic of discussion.
s_politik_1.text_lu: D'Politik ass e komplexen an oft kontroversen Diskussiounsthema.

s_politik_1.text_en: He is very interested in the political situation of the country.
s_politik_1.text_lu: Hien ass ganz interesséiert un der politescher Situatioun vum Land.

s_staat_1.text_en: The state provides many services to its citizens, like education.
s_staat_1.text_lu: De Staat bitt sengem Bierger vill Servicer, wéi z.B. d'Educatioun.

s_staat_1.text_en: Luxembourg is a sovereign state located in the heart of Europe.
s_staat_1.text_lu: Lëtzebuerg ass e souveräne Staat, deen am Häerz vun Europa läit.

s_regierung_1.text_en: The government decided to invest more money in education and research.
s_regierung_1.text_lu: D'Regierung huet decidéiert méi Geld an d'Educatioun an d'Fuerschung ze investéieren.

s_regierung_1.text_en: A new government was formed after the recent national elections.
s_regierung_1.text_lu: Eng nei Regierung gouf nom rezenten nationale Wal gebilt.

s_wahlen_1.text_en: The national elections will take place in October of this year.
s_wahlen_1.text_lu: D'national Wahlen fidderen an Oktober dëst Joer statt.

s_wahlen_1.text_en: Every citizen has the right to vote in the democratic elections.
s_wahlen_1.text_lu: All Bierger huet de Recht, bei de demokrateschen Walen ze wielen.

s_bierger_1.text_en: Every citizen has certain rights and duties within the state.
s_bierger_1.text_lu: All Kanner hunn bestëmmte Rechter a Pflichten am Staat.

s_bierger_1.text_en: The concerns of the citizens were carefully heard by the mayor.
s_bierger_1.text_lu: D'Bedenken vun de Bierger goufen vum Buergermeeschter virsiichteg héieren.

s_geriicht_1.text_en: The case was brought before a court to determine the truth.
s_geriicht_1.text_lu: De Fall gouf viru e Gerëcht bruecht, fir d'Wourecht festzestellen.

s_geriicht_1.text_en: The final decision of the judge was respected by both parties.
s_geriicht_1.text_lu: D'final Decisioun vum Riichter gouf vun de béiden Parteien respektéiert.

s_strof_1.text_en: The individual received a heavy penalty for the recent crime.
s_strof_1.text_lu: Den Individuoll gouf fir de rezenten Delikt schwéier bestrooft.

s_strof_1.text_en: Punishment should be fair and proportionate to the offense committed.
s_strof_1.text_lu: D'Strof soll fair a proportional zum Verbrechen sinn.

s_sécherheet_1.text_en: Security measures have been increased after the recent events.
s_sécherheet_1.text_lu: D'Sécherheetsmoossnamen goufen no de rezente Evenementer verstäerkt.

s_sécherheet_1.text_en: Safety is a top priority for every construction project in the city.
s_sécherheet_1.text_lu: Sécherheet ass eng Top-Prioritéit fir all Bauprojet an der Stad.

s_gefor_1.text_en: The hikers were in grave danger due to the sudden heavy storm.
s_gefor_1.text_lu: D'Wanderer waren an grousser Gefouer wéinst dem plötzlechen schwéieren Sturm.

s_gefor_1.text_en: There is no immediate danger to the residents of the local area.
s_gefor_1.text_lu: Et gëtt keng direkten Gefouer fir d'Bewunner aus der lokaler Géigend.

s_accident_1.text_en: A serious accident occurred on the main road early this morning.
s_accident_1.text_lu: E grave Accident huet sech fréi moies op der Haaptstrooss passéiert.

s_accident_1.text_en: Thankfully, no one was seriously injured in the minor accident.
s_accident_1.text_lu: Glücklicherweise wurde bei dem leichten Unfall niemand schwer verletzt.

s_rettung_1.text_en: The rescue team arrived quickly to save the trapped hikers.
s_rettung_1.text_lu: D'Rettungsteam ass séier ukomm, fir d'Hiker, déi gefaangen waren, ze retten.

s_rettung_1.text_en: The successful rescue of the child was televised all around the country.
s_rettung_1.text_lu: D'erfollegräich Rettung vum Kand gouf am ganze Land am Televisioun ausgestraalt.

s_noutfall_1.text_en: In case of an emergency, please call the number one-one-two.
s_noutfall_1.text_lu: Am Fall vun enger Nout, ruff w.e.g. d'Nummer 1-1-2.

s_noutfall_1.text_en: The hospital has a special unit for medical emergency cases.
s_noutfall_1.text_lu: L'Hôpital dispose d'une unité spéciale pour les urgences médicales.

s_zukunft_1.text_en: I have great hopes for the future of our beautiful city.
s_zukunft_1.text_lu: Ech hunn grouss Hoffnungen fir d'Zukunft vun eiser schéiner Stad.

s_zukunft_1.text_en: What will the world look like in the near and distant future?
s_zukunft_1.text_lu: Wéi wäert d'Welt an der noer an der wäiter Zukunft ausseien?

s_vergaangenheet_1.text_en: We should learn from the mistakes of the past to build a better future.
s_vergaangenheet_1.text_lu: Mir sollten aus den Feeler aus der Vergangenheet léieren, fir eng besser Zukunft opzebauen.

s_vergaangenheet_1.text_en: The history of the city is very interesting to study in depth.
s_vergaangenheet_1.text_lu: D'Geschicht vun der Stad ass ganz interessant, déi am Detail studéiert ka ginn.

s_moment_1.text_en: I am very busy at this moment, can we talk a bit later?
s_moment_1.text_lu: Ech sinn momentan ganz beschäftegt, kënne mir e bësschen méi spéit schwätzen?

s_moment_1.text_en: That was a very special moment that we will always remember.
s_moment_1.text_lu: Dat war e ganz speziellen Moment, deen mir eis ëmmer erënneren.

s_dauer_1.text_en: The duration of the movie was over three hours, which felt long.
s_dauer_1.text_lu: D'Dauer vum Film war méi wéi dräi Stonnen, wat laang gedauert huet.

s_dauer_1.text_en: The project will be finished within the planned duration of a year.
s_dauer_1.text_lu: De Projet wäert am geplannte Zäitraum vun engem Joer fäerdeg sinn.

s_pause_1.text_en: I need a short break after working for four hours continuously.
s_pause_1.text_lu: Ech brauch eng kuerz Paus nodeem ech kontinuéierlech fir véier Stonnen geschafft hunn.

s_pause_1.text_en: We took a coffee break during the long and difficult meeting.
s_pause_1.text_lu: Mir hunn eng Kaffeepaus während dem laangen a schwéieren Meeting gemaach.

s_bestëmmten_1.text_en: A specific amount of money was donated to the local charity.
s_bestëmmten_1.text_lu: Eng bestëmmte Geldsumme gouf un d'lokal Charity gespent.

s_bestëmmten_1.text_en: In certain cases, the rules can be applied more flexibly.
s_bestëmmten_1.text_lu: An e puer Fäll kënnen d'Regelen méi flexibel ugewannt ginn.

s_bestëmmtes_1.text_en: Is there something specific that you are looking for today?
s_bestëmmtes_1.text_lu: Gëtz et eppes Spezifesch, wat Dir haut sicht?

s_bestëmmtes_1.text_en: A certain event occurred that changed everything for us.
s_bestëmmtes_1.text_lu: E bestëmmten Evenement ass passé, dat alles fir eis verännert huet.

s_einfachen_1.text_en: I prefer a simple lifestyle away from the big and busy city.
s_einfachen_1.text_lu: Ech preferéiere e einfachen Liewensstil ewech vun der grousser a lieweger Stad.

s_einfachen_1.text_en: The instructions were given in a simple and easy way.
s_einfachen_1.text_lu: D'Instruktioune goufen op eng einfach an einfach Manéier ginn.

s_einfacher_1.text_en: It would be much easier to take the train than to drive a car.
s_einfacher_1.text_lu: Et wär vill méi einfach mam Zuch ze fueren wéi mam Auto.

s_einfacher_1.text_en: Finding a simpler solution to the problem take some time.
s_einfacher_1.text_lu: Eng méi einfach Léisung fir de Problem ze fannen, dauert e bëssen Zäit.

s_méiglechen_1.text_en: We must consider every possible solution to the current problem.
s_méiglechen_1.text_lu: Mir mussen all méiglech Léisung fir de aktuelle Problem berücksichtegen.

s_méiglechen_1.text_en: A potential outcome was discussed during the recent meeting.
s_méiglechen_1.text_lu: E potenzielle Resultat gouf bei der rezenten Reunioun diskutéiert.

s_onméiglechen_1.text_en: Solving the complex puzzle was an almost impossible task for me.
s_onméiglechen_1.text_lu: D'komplex Puzzle ze léisen war fir mech eng bal onméiglech Aufgab.

s_onméiglechen_1.text_en: He felt that reaching the mountain top was an impossible feat.
s_onméiglechen_1.text_lu: Hie fonnt, dass et onméiglech wier, den Top vum Bierg ze erreechen.

s_wichtegen_1.text_en: This is an important decision that will affect our whole future.
s_wichtegen_1.text_lu: Dëst ass eng wichteg Entscheedung, déi eis ganzt Zukunft wäert beaflossen.

s_wichtegen_1.text_en: He played a significant role in the success of the project.
s_wichtegen_1.text_lu: Hien huet eng bedeitend Roll beim Succès vum Projet gespillt.

s_wichteges_1.text_en: I have something very important to tell you before you go.
s_wichteges_1.text_lu: Ech hunn eppes ganz Wichtegt ze soen, ier du gees.

s_wichteges_1.text_en: A significant event occurred that changed the course of history.
s_wichteges_1.text_lu: Eng bedeitend Event ass passéiert, dat de Verlaf vun der Geschicht verännert huet.

s_nächstes_1.text_en: The next meeting will take place in the city hall next week.
s_nächstes_1.text_lu: Den nächsten Treffen wäert nächste Woch am Stiedhaus stattfinden.

s_nächstes_1.text_en: I am planning to buy a new car during the following year.
s_nächstes_1.text_lu: Ech plannen am lafende Joer e neie Auto ze kafen.

s_ganzes_1.text_en: He ate a whole pizza by himself and was still feeling hungry.
s_ganzes_1.text_lu: Hien huet eng ganz Pizza alleng gegess an huet trotzdem nach Honger.

s_ganzes_1.text_en: The entire project was completed within the planned budget.
s_ganzes_1.text_lu: De ganz Projet gouf am Kader vum geplangten Budget ofgeschloss.

s_neies_1.text_en: I would like to try something new for my dinner tonight.
s_neies_1.text_lu: Ech wëll haut Awen eppes neies fir Kichen probéieren.

s_neies_1.text_en: A new era in the history of the city has finally begun.
s_neies_1.text_lu: Eng nei Ära an der Geschicht vun der Stad huet endlech ugefaangen.

s_jonkt_1.text_en: A small child was playing with a ball in the garden behind us.
s_jonkt_1.text_lu: E klenge Jong spillt mat engem Ball am Gaart hënner eis.

s_jonkt_1.text_en: The young girl is a very talented and dedicated musician.
s_jonkt_1.text_lu: D'jong Meedchen ass eng ganz talentéiert a engagéiert Musekerin.

s_schéint_1.text_en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely beautiful.
s_schéint_1.text_lu: D'Vue vum Spëtz vum Bierg war absolut schéin.

s_schéint_1.text_en: I bought a beautiful dress for the upcoming formal party.
s_schéint_1.text_lu: Ech hunn e schéint Kleed fir déi kommend formell Party kaaft.

s_klengt_1.text_en: A small child was crying for its mother in the street.
s_klengt_1.text_lu: E klengt Kand huet an der Strooss fir seng Mamm geplackt.

s_klengt_1.text_en: Our apartment is quite small, but it is located in the city center.
s_klengt_1.text_lu: Eis Appartement ass éischter kleng, mee et ass am Zentrum vun der Stad.

s_wäit_1.text_en: The station is not far from here, only a five minute walk.
s_wäit_1.text_lu: D'Statioun ass net wäit vun hei, just e fënnef-Minutten-Spazéiergang.

s_wäit_1.text_en: How far is the city of Luxembourg from the German border?
s_wäit_1.text_lu: Wéi wäit ass d'Stad Lëtzebuerg vun der däitscher Grenz ewech?

s_lénks_1.text_en: Please turn left at the next intersection to reach the museum.
s_lénks_1.text_lu: Géi bei der nächster Kräizung lénks, fir de Musée ze erreechen.

s_lénks_1.text_en: The library is on the left side of the main office building.
s_lénks_1.text_lu: D'Bibliothéik ass op der lénker Säit vum Haaptgebai.

s_riets_1.text_en: The hotel is located on the right side of the main street.
s_riets_1.text_lu: Den Hotel ass op der rietser Säit vun der Haaptstrooss.

s_riets_1.text_en: Please keep to the right when you are walking in the hallway.
s_riets_1.text_lu: Bleift wéi weg op der rietser Säit, wann Dir am Gang laaft.

s_uewen_1.text_en: The apartment is on the top floor and has a beautiful view.
s_uewen_1.text_lu: L'appartement ass am Top-Etage an huet e schéonen Ausbléck.

s_uewen_1.text_en: The book is up there on the top shelf of the large library.
s_uewen_1.text_lu: De Buch steet do uewen op der oberster Etage vun der grousser Bibliothéik.

s_ënnen_1.text_en: The kitchen is on the ground floor, right down the hallway.
s_ënnen_1.text_lu: D'Kichen ass am Parterre, direkt am Gang.

s_ënnen_1.text_en: I left my keys down there on the kitchen table this morning.
s_ënnen_1.text_lu: Ech hunn meng Schlësselscheelee bei mir op der Kichen-Tësch gelooss, e Mueren.

s_bannen_1.text_en: It is much warmer inside the house than it is outside today.
s_bannen_1.text_lu: Et ass vill waarmmer an der Haus wéi et haut dobaussen ass.

s_bannen_1.text_en: Everything is ready inside the meeting room for the project.
s_bannen_1.text_lu: Alles ass am Meetingraum fir de Projet prett.

s_baussen_1.text_en: I like to spend time outside in nature when the sun is out.
s_baussen_1.text_lu: Ech gär Zäit dobaussen an der Natur verbringen wann d'Sonn eraus ass.

s_baussen_1.text_en: There were many birds singing outside my window this morning.
s_baussen_1.text_lu: Et waren vill Vëlleken, déi ech haut Moien bei mengem Fënster gesinn hunn.

s_vir_1.text_en: I am standing right in front of the main entrance to the city hall.
s_vir_1.text_lu: Ech steet direkt virun dem Haaptentrée vum Stiedhaus.

s_vir_1.text_en: Please finish your dinner before you start doing your homework.
s_vir_1.text_lu: Eisst Ären Iessen op, ier Dir mat Är Heemwäerk ufänkt.

s_hannen_1.text_en: The bathroom is located at the back of the long hallway.
s_hannen_1.text_lu: D'Bad ass am Enn vum laange Gang.

s_hannen_1.text_en: There is a large garden situated at the back of our house.
s_hannen_1.text_lu: Et gëtt e groussen Jardin, deen am Réckhaus steet.

s_matten_1.text_en: The old church is located right in the middle of the city.
s_matten_1.text_lu: D'al Kierch ass riets an der Mëtt vun der Stad.

s_matten_1.text_en: We are currently in the middle of a very long and difficult task.
s_matten_1.text_lu: Mir sinn derzeit an der Mëtt vun enger ganz laanger a schwéierer Aarbecht.

s_kaum_1.text_en: I can hardly understand what he says, he speaks fast.
s_kaum_1.text_lu: Ech kann kaum verstinn wat hien seet, hien schwätzt séier.

s_kaum_1.text_en: There was hardly anyone else in the park so early.
s_kaum_1.text_lu: Et war kaum iergendeen aneren am Park zu där Zäit.

s_zimlech_1.text_en: The exam was quite difficult, but I think I passed.
s_zimlech_1.text_lu: Den Examen war zimmlech schwéier, mee ech mengen ech hunn bestanden.

s_zimlech_1.text_en: It is quite a long walk to the city center from here.
s_zimlech_1.text_lu: Et ass e ganz laange Spazéiergang bis an d'Stad vu bei.

s_nëmmen_1.text_en: Only three students arrived on time for the meeting today.
s_nëmmen_1.text_lu: Nëmmen dräi Studenten sinn am Zäit fir d'Reunioun haut ukomm.

s_nëmmen_1.text_en: I have only one sister, who is much older than I am.
s_nëmmen_1.text_lu: Ech hunn just eng Schwëster, déi vill méi al wéi ech ass.

s_selten_1.text_en: It is rare to see such a dedicated and talented student.
s_selten_1.text_lu: Et ass rar, esou e engagéierten a talentéierten Student ze gesinn.

s_selten_1.text_en: This type of flower blooms very rarely in this region.
s_selten_1.text_lu: Dës Aart Blumm bléit ganz selten an dëser Regioun.

s_den ament_1.text_en: I am currently out of office, please leave a message.
s_den ament_1.text_lu: Ech sinn momentan net am Büro, léisst wgl. eng Message.

s_den ament_1.text_en: At this moment, everything seems to be going quite well.
s_den ament_1.text_lu: Am Moment schéngt alles ganz gutt ze lafen.

s_momentan_1.text_en: We are currently experiencing some technical difficulties.
s_momentan_1.text_lu: Mir hunn momentan e puer technesch Problemer.

s_momentan_1.text_en: Momentary success is not enough, we need long-term growth.
s_momentan_1.text_lu: Momentanen Erfolleg ass net genuch, mir brauchen langfristeg Wuesstum.

s_an der tëschenzäit_1.text_en: I will wait here; in the meantime, you can go and look.
s_an der tëschenzäit_1.text_lu: Ech wäert hei waarden; an der Tëschenzäit kënnt Dir kucken.

s_an der tëschenzäit_1.text_en: In the interim between meetings, I checked my emails.
s_an der tëschenzäit_1.text_lu: Tëscht den Reuniounen hunn ech meng E-Mailen iwwerpréift.

s_entweeder_1.text_en: You can either stay here or come with us to the park.
s_entweeder_1.text_lu: Dir kënnt entweder hei bleiwen oder mat eis an de Park kommen.

s_entweeder_1.text_en: Either way, we must arrive at the station by five.
s_entweeder_1.text_lu: Egal wéi, mir mussen bis fënnef am Gare sinn.

s_weder_1.text_en: Neither the teacher nor the students were in the room.
s_weder_1.text_lu: Weder de Professeur nach d'Schüler waren an der Sall.

s_weder_1.text_en: I have neither the time nor the money for a holiday.
s_weder_1.text_lu: Ech hunn wéinst dem Geld- a Zäitmangel keng Méiglechkeet fir e Vakanz.

s_du_1.text_en: You should focus on your studies to get a good job.
s_du_1.text_lu: Dir sollt Iech op Äre Studium konzentréieren, fir eng gutt Aarbecht ze kréien.

s_du_1.text_en: Are you coming with us to the cinema tonight?
s_du_1.text_lu: Komms du mat eis an d'Kino haut an der Nuecht?

s_mech_1.text_en: He invited me to the party but I couldn't go then.
s_mech_1.text_lu: Hie huet mech op d'Party invitéiert, awer ech konnt net dohinn goen.

s_mech_1.text_en: Please tell me the truth about what happened back then.
s_mech_1.text_lu: Soe mir w.e.g. d'Wahrheet iwwer wat dofirhier geschitt ass.

s_dech_1.text_en: I will support you in whatever decision you make now.
s_dech_1.text_lu: Ech wäert Iech bei all Entscheedung, déi Dir elo trëfft, ënnerstëtzen.

s_dech_1.text_en: Can I see you at the station at five o'clock today?
s_dech_1.text_lu: Kann ech dich haut um fënnef Auer am Bahnhof treffen?

s_him_1.text_en: I gave him the keys to the house early this morning.
s_him_1.text_lu: Ech hunn him de Schlässel vum Haus fréi moies ginn.

s_him_1.text_en: She told him a secret that he promised to keep well.
s_him_1.text_lu: Si huet him e Geheimnis erzielt, dat hien versprach huet, gutt ze bewahren.

s_eis_1.text_en: The teacher gave us a lot of homework for the weekend.
s_eis_1.text_lu: De Professeur huet eis fir de Weekend vill Hausaufgaben opginn.

s_eis_1.text_en: He joined us for dinner at the new Italian restaurant.
s_eis_1.text_lu: Hie gouf bei eis fir Iessen am neien italieeneschen Restaurant.

s_iech_1.text_en: I brought this for you all to enjoy at the party.
s_iech_1.text_lu: Ech hunn dëst matbruecht, fir datt dir et all op der Party genéisst.

s_iech_1.text_en: I will meet you all at the main entrance of the park.
s_iech_1.text_lu: Ech begéinen Iech all beim Haaptentree vum Park.

s_mäin_1.text_en: This is my house and that one over there is yours.
s_mäin_1.text_lu: Dëst ass mäi Haus a dat do dräi ass däin.

s_mäin_1.text_en: My coffee is cold, could you please warm it up again?
s_mäin_1.text_lu: Mäi Kaffi ass kal, kéint Dir et wärmen?

s_däin_1.text_en: Is this your book or did you borrow it from someone?
s_däin_1.text_lu: Ass dëst Äert Buch oder huet et vun iemanden geléint?

s_däin_1.text_en: Your house is very beautiful and has a large garden.
s_däin_1.text_lu: Är Haus ass ganz schéin a gëtt et e groussen Jardin.
